SEARCH
Package Presentation

Class UIManager

java.lang.Object
Presentation.UIManager
public class UIManager extends Object
The UIManager class is responsible for managing the user interface interactions, including displaying messages, presenting the main menu, managing product-related actions, managing shop-related actions, and collecting user input.

    Description

    Presents the main menu to the user and collects their choice.

    • UIManager

      public UIManager()

  • Method Details

    • showMessage

      public void showMessage(String message)
      Displays a message with a new line.
      Parameters:
      message - The message to be displayed.

    • showMessageWithNoSpace

      public void showMessageWithNoSpace(String message)
      Displays a message without a new line.
      Parameters:
      message - The message to be displayed.

    • askForMainMenu

      public int askForMainMenu()
      Presents the main menu to the user and collects their choice.
      Returns:
      The user's choice from the main menu.

    • askForInt

      public int askForInt(String message, int optMin, int optMax)
      Collects an integer input from the user within a specified range.
      Parameters:
      message - The message prompting the user for input.
      optMin - The minimum allowed value for the input.
      optMax - The maximum allowed value for the input.
      Returns:
      The validated integer input from the user.

    • closeShops

      public void closeShops()
      Displays a closing message when the user exits the application.

    • presentationToMall

      public void presentationToMall()
      Displays a presentation message when the user enters the application.

    • askForManageProductMenu

      public int askForManageProductMenu()
      Presents the menu for managing product-related actions and collects the user's choice.
      Returns:
      The user's choice for managing products.

    • askForString

      public String askForString(String message)
      Collects a string input from the user.
      Parameters:
      message - The message prompting the user for input.
      Returns:
      The string input provided by the user.

    • askForFloat

      public float askForFloat(String message)
      Collects a float input from the user, handling potential exceptions.
      Parameters:
      message - The message prompting the user for input.
      Returns:
      The validated float input from the user.

    • askForSelectedStrings

      public String askForSelectedStrings(boolean productOrShop, String message)
      Collects a selected string option from the user, validating against specified options.
      Parameters:
      productOrShop - Indicates whether the options are for a product or a shop.
      message - The message prompting the user for input.
      Returns:
      The selected string option provided by the user.

    • askForManageShopMenu

      public int askForManageShopMenu()
      Presents the menu for managing shop-related actions and collects the user's choice.
      Returns:
      The user's choice for managing shops.

    • adaptStringToFirstMayus

      public String adaptStringToFirstMayus(String sentence)
      Adapts a String so it has it first letter in mayus.
      Parameters:
      sentence - the string that must be adapted.
      Returns:
      the adapted String.
